name: Fastball
description: Power x1.25, Contact x0.85. Swing hard.

name: Curveball
description: Contact x1.25, Power x0.85. Stay back on it.

name: Changeup
description: The first card of each play scores half. Way out in front.

name: Knuckleball
description: It dances. Patient hitters feast: total Discipline is added to base.

name: Sinker
description: Speed x0.75. Grounders everywhere: half of total Defense is added to base.
